data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for category tagging.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for category tagging (cosmetic, functional, safety) but did not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for category tagging but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or testing. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for category tagging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the category tagging requirement.
